description: Clean and standardize the 'legacy_stations' layer by refactoring its fields. Rename 'STN_ID_X' to 'station_id' (String), 'LOC_NM' to 'name' (String), 'READ_VAL' to 'temperature' (changing the type to Double/Real), and 'OBS_DT' to 'date' (Date). Remove the 'LEGACY_CD' and 'TECH_N' fields. Export the processed layer to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/clean_stations.geojson.
